content:
Given an undirected dynamic graph with the edges [(1, 2, 1), (1, 3, 1), (1, 2, 5), (3, 1, 6)], what nodes are linked with node 1 at time 1?
Answer: [2]

Given an undirected dynamic graph with the edges [(3, 7, 1), (3, 9, 1), (4, 6, 2), (7, 9, 2), (1, 8, 3), (2, 8, 3), (3, 8, 3), (4, 9, 3), (3, 6, 4), (0, 2, 5), (2, 9, 5), (0, 7, 6), (0, 1, 7), (1, 9, 7), (1, 6, 8), (6, 9, 8), (2, 7, 9), (3, 5, 9)], what nodes are linked with node 2 at time 5?
Answer: [3, 6, 7, 9]
